film.title: Beneath the Blue
film.overview: Dolphin experts confront the US Navy when its sonar program is suspected of causing the animals' deaths.

dialogues.dialogue: Mmm, I'm not above a little claim jumping,  time to time.  Oh, you're shameless.  (Craig) That wouldn't be the famous Rasca, would it?  (Styles) Everyone on the island is talking about her.
Okay.  (Tamika sighs) You two are too much.  Don't worry, we ain't got no shame.  And we get results.  (Dramatic music)
before the Navy got a chance to examine them.  Hmm, were they?  A shame.  If I were a detective,  I'd think you pulled a fast one on us.
